title: JMAP SSRF origin-check is correct and should be defended
description: JmapClient::init_session (jmap.rs:138-152) validates that the server-returned apiUrl has the same origin as the configured session_url, blocking SSRF via a malicious JMAP server. A contributor might simplify this to just using apiUrl directly. Do not: the check is the primary SSRF defense. The oracle test init_session_rejects_ssrf_api_url (jmap.rs:477-510) provides independent verification.
